items.name: Pink Squid Plush Keychain
items.description:
Pink Squid Plush Keychain 🦑💖
Carry a splash of cuteness wherever you go with the Pink Squid Plush Keychain! This adorable keychain features a soft, squishy pink squid design that’s perfect for anyone who loves unique and cute accessories. Whether you’re looking to add a quirky touch to your keys or a fun accessory to your bag, this plush keychain is the perfect way to show off your love for all things cute and squid-themed!

Key Features:

Soft and squishy plush pink squid design

Lightweight and perfect for keychains or bags

Ideal for cute, quirky, or animal-themed outfits

A perfect gift for squid lovers or anyone who loves unique accessories


Tags:

items.name: Caramel Red Apple Head
items.description: Get your sweet tooth ready with the Caramel Apple Head! This deliciously fun accessory turns your avatar’s head into a shiny, sticky treat—complete with gooey caramel dripping down the sides. With its glossy candy coating and a playful, quirky look, it’s perfect for anyone who wants to bring a taste of autumn to their Roblox style. It’s not just a snack; it’s a statement! Just be careful—people might want to take a bite!

items.name: Raw Darkness Vultures Hat
items.description:
Collab between Hyacinth UGC and Aeteris Fantasy
Purchase HERE: https://www.roblox.com/games/72687221433834/Exclusives-Limiteds-Hub
-
A hat worn by members of a pop group, many decades ago. This hat was customized for a performance of their hit song, Vulture. After their song rose to fame again due to the viral dance circulating on social media, official hats from the performance were created in honor of the song's resurgence decades later. The hat features a black fabric base, with high-quality resin pieces placed on top, most notably the vulture skull and the bone horns. The rims of the hat are adorned with metal-like spikes placed carefully around them. Lastly, the hat was textured to have a grungy, dark black metal look. Buy some of these hats for yourself!
-
Tags: Onyx, White, Black, Metal, Grunge, Horns, Sparkles, Chrome, Gem, Chains, Emo, y2k, Dark, Matte, Shiny, Cross, Goth, Trendy, Hat, Outlaw, Gun, Bone, Skeleton
